name: Pyi-Gyi Nga Kazun Ywet (Squid and Dandelion S
recipeIngredient: 1 tsp Dried red hot chili flakes
1 lb Fresh squids, dressed, cut into 1/2-inch round slices
1/4 lb Dandelion greens, green leaves only, halved
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the chili flakes, lemon juice, soy sauce, and sugar together. Let stand for 15 minutes.
2. Heat the oil in a wok or skillet over moderate heat. Fry the garlic for 1 minute until fragrant.
3. Add the squid slices to the pan and stir fry for 2 minutes until they turn opaque and cook through.
4. Pour in the chili/lemon mixture and continue frying for another 2 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Add the dandelion greens and cook for a further 2 minutes until just wilted.
6. Remove from heat and serve warm with other dishes.
Note: Watercress and Swiss chard can be used as substitutes for dandelion greens due to their similar taste profile.
